digest.component_or_area: CI lint gate (make lint / actionlint scope)
propositions: make lint scopes actionlint to release.yml only, leaving all other workflows unvalidated.
An invalid or unparseable workflow change can merge green and silently disable a workflow, as happened with the reconcile-bridge outage.
actionlint coverage should be widened to run over all .github/workflows/*.yml and *.yaml files.
zizmor must remain scoped to release.yml; only actionlint scope is widened.
A new regression test must assert the Makefile actionlints all workflows and fails if re-narrowed to release.yml only.
Documentation and Makefile comments claiming actionlint is scoped to release.yml must be corrected.
